free_text: EXPERIMENTAL SITE FOR ENERGY AND INTENSITY
-NUCLEAR STRUCTURE OF HF-179 STUDIED WITH N-G, D-P AND
THE HIGH FLUX REACTOR AT ILL, GRENOBLE.
.THERMAL NEUTRON SPECTRUM. THE NEUTRON FLUX AT ILL WAS
.70 MG OF HFO2 POWDER, ENRICHED TO 92.4 PERCENT IN
.SECONDARY GAMMA-RAYS BETWEEN 40 AND 600 KEV WERE DE-
TECTED WITH GAMS1. THE GAMS2/3 WAS USED FOR THE ENERGY
REGION FROM 150 TO 1400 KEV.  THE ENERGIES WERE
CALIBRATED USING ENERGIES (55.79 AND 54.611 KEV) OF
TWO  X-RAY PEAKS IN HF THE INTENSITY CALIBRATION,
INCLUDING CORRECTION FOR SELF-ABSORPTION WAS DONE
USING INTENSITIES FROM PREVIOUS MEASUREMENTS AT RISO.
ONLY STATISTICAL ERRORS ARE GIVEN FOR
.DATA TAKEN FROM TABLE 2 OF MAIN REF.
